children.heading: Trial period under limited appointment
children.label: a Trial period under limited appointment

children.text: to offer a career appointment to the candidate under , orsection 3943 of this title
to recommend to the President that the candidate be given a career appointment under .section 3942 of this title

children.heading: Decisions by Secretary
children.label: b Decisions by Secretary
children.text: Decisions by the Secretary under subsection (a) shall be based upon the recommendations of boards, established by the Secretary and composed entirely or primarily of career members of the Service, which shall evaluate the fitness and aptitude of career candidates for the work of the Service.

children.heading: Foreign Service Grievance Board decisions
children.label: c Foreign Service Grievance Board decisions
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to limit the authority of the Secretary or the Foreign Service Grievance Board under .section 4137 of this title
